name: Genesis Island
description: A small island accessible by boat. Guilds can claim and defend it as their own. The birthplace of the GRUDGE legacy.

_scaleRef.note: 1 Unity unit ≈ 1 meter ≈ 2.5 DCQ units. Height compressed 0.22x. Island is ~1835×1722 DCQ units centered in 16000×16000 zone.

subZones.name: Harbor
subZones.description: Docked ships and fishing boats. Safe harbor for arriving players.

subZones.name: Mine
subZones.description: Rich ore deposits. Mining carts and crystal veins.

subZones.name: Cave Entrance
subZones.description: Dark cave entrance leading underground. Spiders lurk within.

subZones.name: Barbarian Camp
subZones.description: Fortified starting camp with palisade walls, armory, and stables.

subZones.name: PvP Arena Platform
subZones.description: Elevated stone platform with tiered arenas for duels and crew battles.

dungeons.name: Genesis Cave
dungeons.description: Winding cave beneath the island. Spiders, bats, and hidden treasure.
